name: circuit
description: Choose and run the right Circuit flow from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Choose and run the right Circuit flow
interface.longDescription: Use @Circuit with a natural-language coding task. Codex can choose the best bundled Circuit flow, run the local circuit-next engine, render progress, and surface the Circuit summary. Direct Circuit flow skills remain available when you already know the flow.
defaultPrompt: Use Circuit to fix this bug
Use Circuit to review this change
